message:
feat(gateway): Add agent state lifecycle management and cleanup

Implements a periodic cleanup job for stale agent states and improves
agent spawn validation:

Agent State Cleanup Job (agent-state-machine.ts):
- Adds startStateCleanupJob() and stopStateCleanupJob() exports
- Runs every 5 minutes to clean up states older than 1 hour
- Uses unref() on interval handle to avoid blocking process exit
- Logs job start/stop events for observability

Index Integration (index.ts):
- Imports and starts the state cleanup job alongside existing jobs
- Runs at startup: cleanup, DCG cleanup, state cleanup, heartbeat

Agent Spawn Validation (agent.ts):
- Checks both runtime map AND lifecycle state machine before spawning
- Uses isTerminalState() helper to determine if existing state allows
  new spawn (only terminal states like STOPPED/CRASHED allow respawn)
- Prevents race conditions where agent ID exists in state but not
  in runtime map (or vice versa)

This prevents orphaned agent states from accumulating in memory and
ensures proper lifecycle transitions for agent respawning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
